body:
# Rose Hadshar

**Role:** Researcher

[Rose Hadshar](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rhadshar/) is a researcher at Forethought. Before joining Forethought she was a project manager at the [Future of Humanity Institute](https://www.futureofhumanityinstitute.org/), and spent the last 3 years as an AI governance researcher contracting with [Open Philanthropy](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/) and [Blueprint Biosecurity](https://blueprintbiosecurity.org/), including helping to draft the Forecasting Research Institute’s [report on AI risk and timelines](https://forecastingresearch.org/xpt).
